source.name: NCBI UniVec_Core
source.license: NCBI public reference data with README.uv disclaimer.

filters: UniVec_Core FASTA definition lines are normalized to stable SMS3 ids.
The scanner uses an ungapped local extension model and does not claim BLAST/VecScreen equivalence.
redistribution: NCBI UniVec_Core data are bundled as derived browser-local reference data. README.uv states a United States Government disclaimer and identifies company-contributed non-GenBank sources.
oracleFixtures: Future oracle fixtures should include BLAST+/VecScreen-style command output for perfect, reverse-strand, short high-identity, near-threshold mismatch, and clean no-hit cases.
notes: NCBI VecScreen uses BLAST with stringent vector-screening parameters; SMS3 currently uses a lighter ungapped scanner suitable for browser demonstration.
The browser app does not fetch external contamination databases at runtime.
